Input Optgroup

Source: Figma Input_Optgroup_Base (2573:6623). Grouped dropdown with labeled sections (Optgroup_Head + list rows). Trigger states match Input Dropdown; open menu uses Dropdown_Overlay_Optgroup.

Full field (Input_Optgroup_Base)

Trigger states match Input Dropdown -- only the open menu changes (grouped instead of flat list).
